pages.text: Value selectors share one control grammar: $(thing)left-click$() goes to the next value, $(thing)right-click$() goes to the previous value, wheel down or up moves next or previous while hovered, and $(thing)middle-click$() resets the selector.

Reset defaults are Name sort, Ascending order, normal name search, $(thing)Auto target$(), and Player craft output. Use Player Inventory is a separate on/off choice for recipe ingredients and returns to its usual default when reset.
Sorting offers $(thing)Name, Quantity, Mod, and ID$(). Search offers normal names, #tag, and @mod. Use the exact tooltip amount when compact grid labels look similar at very large quantities.

A colored light means a true on/off control such as Use Player Inventory. Sort, search, Fuel Target, and Craft Output are selected values, so they use labels or icons instead. The active page uses a neutral selected-tab frame.
